body_txt: The ability to manipulate sound, whether it's directly generated by the user from their own body and/or out of thin air, or is ambient sound. In its most common form, sound is used as a concussive weapon that can do everything from knock people out to shattering concrete. But it can also take on more esoteric forms, like forcibly muting everything around the user or using it to accelerate healing. This is often folded in with Master of Illusion , likely because non- harmful sound isn't perceived as "real" in the same way as tangible phenomena are. Super-Trope to Super-Scream and Shockwave Clap . A Super Scream is specifically made from the user's vocal apparatus, a Shockwave Clap from a Super Strong clap. Make Some Noise lacks such requirements. Compare and contrast Musical Assassin , Gale-Force Sound , Magic Music , and Vibration Manipulation . Users may have the ability to use a Brown Note . In more whimsical media, characters and creatures with Musical Anatomy will almost always wield sound-based abilities or attacks. See also Sonic Stunner for a weapon that can manipulate sound. For the Dropout improv sketch show, look here .
